name: Steam Revolver
description: Steampunk revolver with brass fittings and steam vent details.

textToImageTask.prompt: Steampunk revolver, brass fittings, engraved steel, small steam vents, hero prop on clean background, multi-view sheet

textTo3DPreviewTask.prompt: Steampunk revolver prop, brass and steel, detailed cylinder, compact grip

textTo3DRefineTask.texturePrompt: polished brass, worn steel, engraved metal, subtle soot, realistic metal wear

styleTexturePrompts.brass-patina: aged brass with patina, matte steel, workshop wear
styleTexturePrompts.black-iron: darkened iron finish, minimal brass, gunmetal sheen
styleTexturePrompts.collector-polish: highly polished brass, clean steel, showroom shine
